reasons: Six per-seat contracts committed under .nexus/deliberation/seat-contracts/ — each with differentiated block_conditions, not renamed copies: cost-discipline.yaml, architecture.yaml, governance-safety.yaml, operator-usability.yaml, evidence-falsifiability.yaml, execution-pragmatism.yaml.

Escalation ladder committed at .nexus/deliberation/escalation-ladder.yaml with four tiers (Tier 0–3), numeric risk_score thresholds, non-numeric triggers (surface_type, novelty_flag, uncertainty_flag), automation eligibility per tier, and explicit v0 heuristic calibration note.

Primary deliberation readiness narrative committed at .nexus/docs/corpus-v1-deliberation-readiness.md — includes Corpus V1 usage workflow, tier decision tree, quality-standard seat mapping, worked example referencing motion-0115, and Corpus V2 forward reference.
Motion-folder phase guide committed at .nexus/docs/motion-folder-phase-guide.md — covers all six motion-package files with structural requirements, failure modes, and before/after examples.
Launch-packet activation path committed at .nexus/programs/launch-packet-activation.md — four steps: validate, convert, inherit, hand off. References .nexus/programs/motion-launch-packet.template.md.

Corpus V2 readiness criteria committed at .nexus/docs/corpus-v2-readiness-criteria.md — 10 falsifiable criteria with honest current-status assessments (2 met, 2 partial, 6 unmet). Does not declare Corpus V2 started.
validate_motion exit 0: motion schema OK. validate_agency exit 0: registry-backed agency OK. No runtime, UI, DB, or portal files modified.
